## Checklist

- [ ] `go build ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./...` passes
- [ ] `gofmt -l .` prints nothing
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`, [DCO](https://developercertificate.org/))
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed (README / docs/ / chart values)
